zh.lifeSummary: 當William FitzAlan於1417年11月23日出生在英國素可阿盧德爾時，他的父親Sir John Arundel32歲，母親Eleanor Berkeley34歲。他和Joan Neville至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1487年12月15日在他的家鄉享年70歲。

nameMeanings.name: FitzAlan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ ( see Fitz ) + the personal name Alan ( see Allen ), ‘son of Alan’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

variants.name: Allen
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Alain, Alein (Old Breton Alan), from a Celtic personal name of great antiquity and obscurity. In England the personal name is now usually spelled Alan, the surname Allen; in Scotland the surname is more often Allan. From 1139 it was common in Scotland, where the surname also derives from Gaelic Ailéne, Ailín, from ail ‘rock’. The present-day frequency of the surname Allen in England and Ireland is partly accounted for by the popularity of the personal name among Breton followers of William the Conqueror, by whom it was imported first to Britain and then to Ireland. Saint Alan(us) was a 5th-century bishop of Quimper, who was a cult figure in medieval Brittany. Another Saint Al(l)an was a Cornish or Breton saint of the 6th century, to whom a church in Cornwall is dedicated.
English: occasionally perhaps from the rare Middle English femaje personal name Aline (Old French Adaline, Aaline), a pet form of ancient Germanic names in Adal-, especially Adalheidis (see Allis ).
French: variant of   Allain  , a cognate of 1 above, and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William FitzAlan was born on 23 November 1417, in Arundel, Sussex, England, his father, Sir John Arundel, was 32 and his mother, Eleanor Berkeley, was 34. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Joan Neville. He died on 15 December 1487, in his hometown, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William FitzAlan est né le 23 novembre 1417, à Arundel, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Arundel, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Berkeley, avait 34 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Joan Neville. Il est décédé le 15 décembre 1487, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William FitzAlan am 23. November 1417 in Arundel, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Arundel 32 und seine Mutter Eleanor Berkeley 34. Er hatte mit Joan Neville mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 15. Dezember 1487 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William FitzAlan è nato il il 23 novembre 1417 nel Arundel, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Sir John Arundel, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Berkeley, aveva 34 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Joan Neville. Morì il 15 dicembre 1487, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William FitzAlanが1417年11月23日にイギリススセックスアルンデルで生まれた時，父Sir John Arundelは32歳，母Eleanor Berkeleyは34歳であった。彼はJoan Nevilleとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1487年12月15日に故郷で70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William FitzAlan(이)가 1417년 11월 23일 영국 수세스 아런들에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Arundel(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Berkeley(은)는 34세였다. 그는 Joan Neville(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1487년 12월 15일 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.23 November 1417–15 December 1487: 23 de novembro de 1417–15 de dezembro de 1487
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William FitzAlan nasceu em 23 de novembro de 1417, em Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Arundel, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Berkeley, tinha 34 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Joan Neville. Ele faleceu em 15 de dezembro de 1487, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William FitzAlan родился 23 ноября 1417 г. в местности арундель, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Arundel было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Berkeley, 34. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Joan Neville. Он умер 15 декабря 1487 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет.

es.23 November 1417–15 December 1487: 23 de noviembre de 1417–15 de diciembre de 1487
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William FitzAlan nació el 23 de noviembre de 1417, en Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Arundel, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Eleanor Berkeley, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Joan Neville. Murió el 15 de diciembre de 1487, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años.
